title: narcissus × perezlarae
intro: Narcissus × perezlarae, also known as the hybrid narcissus, is a cross between the wild narcissus (Narcissus pseudonarcissus) and another species, specifically identified as Narcissus perezlarae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and infections. The plant's extracts have been reported to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can provide various health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory symptoms. Herbal preparations of Narcissus × perezlarae often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's bulbs or flowers, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
